recommendations.title: A Man Escaped
recommendations.overview: A captured French Resistance fighter during World War II engineers a daunting escape from prison.

recommendations.title: Four Nights of a Dreamer
recommendations.overview: Jacques, a young man with artistic aspirations, spends four nights wandering Paris with a young woman, whom he rescued from suicide.

recommendations.title: Mouchette
recommendations.overview: A young girl living in the French countryside suffers constant indignities at the hand of alcoholism and her fellow man.

recommendations.title: Les Dames du bois de Boulogne
recommendations.overview: A love story that follows the maneuverings of a society lady as she connives to initiate a scandalous affair between her aristocratic ex-lover and a prostitute.

recommendations.title: L'Argent
recommendations.overview: A forged 500-franc note is passed from person to person and shop to shop, until it falls into the hands of a genuine innocent who doesn't see it for what it is—which will have devastating consequences on his life.

recommendations.title: Au Hasard Balthazar
recommendations.overview: The story of a donkey Balthazar as he is passed from owner to owner, some kind and some cruel but all with motivations beyond his understanding. Balthazar, whose life parallels that of his first keeper, Marie, is truly a beast of burden, suffering th

recommendations.title: The Trial of Joan of Arc
recommendations.overview: Rouen, Normandy, 1431, during the Hundred Years' War. After being captured by French soldiers from an opposing faction, Joan of Arc, the Maid of Orléans, is unjustly tried by an ecclesiastical court overseen by her English enemies.

recommendations.title: The Devil, Probably
recommendations.overview: Charles drifts through politics, religion and psychoanalysis, rejecting them all. Once he realises the depth of his disgust with the moral and physical decline of the society he lives in, he decides that suicide is the only option...

recommendations.title: Through My Window
recommendations.overview: Raquel's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor turns into something more when he starts developing feelings for her, despite his family's objections.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Country Priest
recommendations.overview: An inexperienced, sickly priest shows up in the rural French community of Ambricourt, where he joins the community's clergy. But the locals don't take kindly to the priest, and his ascetic ways and unsociable demeanor make him an outcast. During Bibl
